'''Blueleaf''' was a common shrub found on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It grew extensively around the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] ruins on the moon, and its essential oils were a stimulant known to enhance the perception of those imbibing it. Blueleaf had cobalt-[[Color/Legends|colored]] leaves arranged in a whorled pattern of five to eight clusters. It had a distinct fragrance that made identification of the shrub easy, and it could grow up to a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] tall. It grew particularly well in glades, and used suckers to spread itself, forming a dense groundcover.<ref name="GG2-1">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref>

They were known for their ability to encroach even on cleared spaces, and were edible. When crushed, they gave off a spicy scent. The Massassi of the moon built a [[Temple of the Blueleaf Cluster/Legends|temple]] on which they carved images of the shrubs. On [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], blueleaf shrubs were grown in beautiful and elaborate gardens.

{{Flora-stub}}
